entity: Kobe Bryant All-NBA selections = 15 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM stg_bref_end_of_season_teams WHERE nba_player_id = 977 AND lg = 'NBA' AND type = 'All-NBA'

notes: Kobe's 15 All-NBA selections (11 First Team, 2 Second Team, 2 Third Team). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 15. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
